title: KB Plan Updated
description: Emitted by `kb plan update <id>` when a plan YAML file is modified. Lets deer-flow and hearth-loom react to plan changes without polling the vault. UNCONSUMED (2026-07 zombie-event audit): no consumer was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry. The 'lets deer-flow and hearth-loom react' language above describes aspirational/intended use, not a verified handler. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write that may become useful later); flagged so the registry stops implying something reads it today. See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.

plan_id.description: UUID v7 of the plan entry

file.description: Absolute path to the plan YAML file
